## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / tooling only

## Checklist

- [ ] `just check` passes locally (lint + tests)
- [ ] New or updated tests cover the change
- [ ] Dialect-sensitive code is tested against the full matrix (PG + SQLite + MariaDB)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Public API additions or changes are reflected in the docs
